versions.version_description: Lee Brice - One Of Them Girls https://youtu.be/0sSuDWdymGQ.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Based on Lee Brice's CMT Campfire video, https://youtu.be/m8vww1F2qTI?t=494

*strumming might be wrong.


[tab][Intro]
e|--0------------------------------------------------------------------------|
B|--4/5\4-4-2-0-------4/5\4-4-2-0--------------------------------------------|
G|--------------1-2~--------------1-2-1--------------------------------------|
D|--------------------------------------2------------------------------------|
A|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
E|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]                    [ch]E[/ch]                                  [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
Are you one of them girls that peels off the Bud Light label?[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C#sus2[/ch]
Just might run th pool table?[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]E[/ch]
Roll your eyes if I call you an angel, ain't you one of them girls?[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bsus2[/ch]                            [ch]C#sus2[/ch]
Ask you to dance, you say "No" just to see how far I'll go[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]A[/ch]                                   [ch]E[/ch]
Your song comes on and your eyes close, that's when I know, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Bsus2[/ch]                              [ch]C#sus2[/ch]
You got your heart on lock down, you got a wall I gotta knock down[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]A[/ch]
Kinda wanna do a shot now[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
One of them girls that ain't tryna meet nobody[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C#sus2[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
You're just here for the party, if I'm wrong then stop me[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]                                 [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
You're one of them girls that ain't handin' out your number[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C#sus2[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
You like to make us want you, you like to make us wonder[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]                      [ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
If you're one of them girls, 'cause I'm one of them boys[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C#sus2[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Trade his whole world, his whole world[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]Bsus2[/ch]                     [ch]C#sus2[/ch]
For one of them girls who likes to act all quiet, sexy, not even tryin'[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]
Yeah, you know I ain't lyin', damn right[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]                                [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
You one of them girls, broke every heart in your hometown[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#sus2[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
On the day you rode out, got 'em all wishin' on stars now[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                       [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
If I found one of them girls that ain't tryna meet nobody[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C#sus2[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
You're just here for the party, if I'm wrong then stop me,[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]                                 [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
You're one of them girls that ain't handin' out your number[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C#sus2[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
You like to make us want you, you like to make us wonder[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                      [ch]E[/ch]
If you're one of them girls[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
Cause I'm one of them boys[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C#sus2[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Would trade his whole world, his whole world[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Bsus2[/ch]           [ch]C#sus2[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
For one of them girls, yeah, one of them girls, yeah[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]
You're one of them girls[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
I wanna lay my lips on[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#sus2[/ch]
Hold all night long[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]
Write a little love song[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
For one of them girls that ain't tryna meet nobody[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C#sus2[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
You're just here for the party, if I'm wrong then stop me, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]                                 [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
You're one of them girls that ain't handin' out your number[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C#sus2[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
You like to make us want you, you like to make us wonder[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                      [ch]E[/ch]
If you're one of them girls[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
Cause, I'm one of them boys[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C#sus2[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Would trade his whole world, his whole world[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
For one of them girls[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]                [ch]C#sus2[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
For one of them girls, yeah[/tab]
